title: NASS Research, Survey, and Technology Advancements in 2017 Serve U.S. Agriculture - Census of Agriculture is Updated for New Agricultural Trends and Ease of Responding
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture's (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) has advanced a number of programs in 2017 to serve U.S. agriculture with customer- and data-driven improvements. Among these enhancements are changes to the every-five-year census of agriculture, which offici...

title: One Man, One Van, Making a Difference
summary: Another way to say meaningful value is ‘going above and beyond.’ Recently, one of our employees did just that. In fact, he went above and beyond any normal definition of above and beyond.
